name: C WorldWide Globale Aktier KL
summary: C WorldWide Globale Aktier KL is an open-ended equity mutual fund launched by Carnegie Kapitalforvaltning AS. The fund is managed by C WorldWide Asset Management Fondsmaeglerselskab A/S. The fund invests in the public equity markets across the globe. It seeks to invest in the stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. The fund benchmarks the performance of its portfolio against the MSCI All Country World Equity Index. C WorldWide Globale Aktier KL was formed on June 30, 1990 and is domiciled in Denmark.
